x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: The WSD Workspace is the primary interface where Now Assist WSD AI insights are presented to managers and employees. Without it, AI-generated space recommendations and occupancy insights are produced but never surfaced where they are needed.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_wsd_core"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Workplace Core (" + gr.getValue("name") + ") is active", finding: "Workplace Core is active. Now Assist WSD AI insights including space recommendations and occupancy analysis are accessible to workplace managers and employees." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_wsd_workspace"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Workplace Service Delivery Workspace is active", finding: "WSD Workspace is active. Now Assist WSD AI insights are surfaced in context for workplace managers." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "WSD Workspace not found or inactive", finding: "WSD Workspace is not active. Now Assist WSD AI insights are not accessible in a contextually relevant interface." }; })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Activate the Workplace Service Delivery workspace via the ServiceNow Store or Plugin Manager. The workspace is required for Now Assist WSD AI insights to surface in context.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_d7f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c73
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[The WSD Workspace is the primary interface where Now Assist WSD AI insights are presented to managers and employees. Without it, AI-generated space recommendations and occupancy insights are produced but never surfaced where they are needed.]]></ai_justification><check_name>WSD Workspace Activation</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var gr = new GlideRecord("sys_store_app"); gr.addQuery("scope", "sn_wsd_core"); gr.setLimit(1); gr.query(); if (gr.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Workplace Core (" + gr.getValue("name") + ") is active", finding: "Workplace Core is active. Now Assist WSD AI insights including space recommendations and occupancy analysis are accessible to workplace managers and employees." }; } var gr2 = new GlideRecord("sys_plugins"); gr2.addQuery("id", "sn_wsd_workspace"); gr2.addQuery("active", true); gr2.setLimit(1); gr2.query(); if (gr2.next()) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: "Workplace Service Delivery Workspace is active", finding: "WSD Workspace is active. Now Assist WSD AI insights are surfaced in context for workplace managers." }; } return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "WSD Workspace not found or inactive", finding: "WSD Workspace is not active. Now Assist WSD AI insights are not accessible in a contextually relevant interface." }; })]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>WSD</module><number>CHK0000605</number><order>800</order><remediation_guidance>Activate the Workplace Service Delivery workspace via the ServiceNow Store or Plugin Manager. The workspace is required for Now Assist WSD AI insights to surface in context.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>d7f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c73</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>WSD Workspace Activation</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_d7f89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c73</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
